title: English 900
subtitle: 900 practical English speaking sentences with Chinese translations
description: A progressive speaking and listening course for daily life, study, campus, academic discussion, and life abroad.

groups.title: Everyday Survival
groups.focus: Start with polite, short sentences for real daily contact: greetings, names, needs, places, prices, and simple problems.

groups.title: Daily Life and Routines
groups.focus: Build automatic sentences for routines, errands, weather, appointments, chores, and simple plans.

groups.title: Study Abroad and Future Plans
groups.focus: Use fuller, flexible English for adaptation, interviews, internships, values, negotiation, culture shock, and long-term goals.

sentences.english: At first it was hard to understand different accents, but little by little I got used to them.
sentences.chinese: 一开始听懂不同口音很难，但慢慢地我适应了。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to make friends, but little by little I found my group.
sentences.chinese: 一开始交朋友很难，但慢慢地我找到了自己的圈子。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to organize my time, but little by little I built a routine.
sentences.chinese: 一开始安排时间很难，但慢慢地我建立了规律。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to participate in class, but little by little I gained confidence.
sentences.chinese: 一开始课堂参与很难，但慢慢地我变得更有信心。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to live far from home, but little by little I became more independent.
sentences.chinese: 一开始离家生活很难，但慢慢地我变得更独立。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to handle paperwork, but little by little I learned the process.
sentences.chinese: 一开始处理手续很难，但慢慢地我熟悉了流程。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to speak on the phone, but little by little I lost the fear.
sentences.chinese: 一开始打电话沟通很难，但慢慢地我不再害怕。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to adapt to the schedule, but little by little I changed my habits.
sentences.chinese: 一开始适应作息很难，但慢慢地我改变了习惯。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to follow fast conversations, but little by little I trained my ear.
sentences.chinese: 一开始跟上快速对话很难，但慢慢地我训练了听力。

sentences.english: At first it was hard to deal with uncertainty, but little by little I learned to ask for help.
sentences.chinese: 一开始应对不确定性很难，但慢慢地我学会了求助。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that patience is essential.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：耐心非常重要。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that communication is more than language.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：沟通不只是语言。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that mistakes can open doors.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：错误也可能打开机会。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that independence takes practice.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：独立需要练习。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that asking for help is not failure.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：求助不是失败。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that every culture has its own logic.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：每种文化都有自己的逻辑。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that listening well changes a conversation.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：认真倾听会改变对话。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that routine creates stability.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：规律带来稳定。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that friendship requires initiative.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：友谊需要主动。

sentences.english: Living abroad has taught me that learning takes time.
sentences.chinese: 海外生活教会我：学习需要时间。
